steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Add the two equations to eliminate $x$: $$2y=\left(\tfrac{x}{4}+6\right)+\left(-\tfrac{x}{4}+20\right)=26.$$

steps.title: Find $2y$
steps.content: So $2y=26$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice A, $26$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
